task_summary: Implement Foundation Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) across UI layers.

action_plan.description: Analyze existing UI components for energy consumption indicators.
action_plan.focus: Identify points where energy levels or adaptation status must be displayed.

action_plan.description: Develop modular components for Energy Level visualization.
action_plan.focus: Create reusable widgets (e.g., progress bars, color-coded indicators) representing energy reserves.

action_plan.description: Implement adaptive logic for UI elements.
action_plan.focus: Ensure that non-critical UI elements degrade gracefully or simplify when energy levels drop below a threshold (Low/Critical).
Document the new 'Energy Adaptation' standard for future development cycles.

risk_assessment.mitigation: Use centralized component library and conduct cross-platform testing.
